nasb.text: If it be from five years even to twenty years old then your valuation for the male shall be twenty shekels and for the female ten shekels.

esv.text: If the person is from five years old up to twenty years old, the valuation shall be for a male twenty shekels, and for a female ten shekels.

cnv.text: 如果是五歲到二十歲，男子的估價是二百二十八克銀子，女子是一百一十四克銀子。

ccb.text: 五至二十岁的男子估价二百二十克银子，女子则估价一百一十克银子；
